title: School (Class 6–10)
description: Build strong Maths & Science base. Olympiads (NSO, IMO) are a bonus.

title: Class 11–12 (PCM)
description: Join JEE coaching (Allen, Resonance, Aakash or free: Unacademy, PW). Focus: Physics, Chemistry, Maths.

title: JEE Main + Advanced
description: JEE Main (NTA) → JEE Advanced (IIT). Score determines IIT/NIT/IIIT/State college.

title: B.Tech (4 years)
description: CSE / IT / ECE preferred. Focus on DSA, projects, open source from Year 1.

title: Internships (Year 2–4)
description: Target Google, Microsoft, Flipkart, startups. Use LinkedIn, Internshala, AngelList.

title: Entry Role (0–2 yrs)
description: Junior Software Engineer / SDE-1. Salary: ₹6–25 LPA depending on company.

title: Mid Level (2–5 yrs)
description: SDE-2 / Software Engineer II. Own features, mentor juniors. ₹20–50 LPA.

title: Senior (5–8 yrs)
description: Senior SDE / Staff Engineer. System design, architecture ownership. ₹40–1.2 Cr.

title: Lead / Principal (8–12 yrs)
description: Tech Lead / Principal Engineer. Cross-team impact. ₹80 L–2 Cr+.

title: Management Track
description: Engineering Manager → Director of Engineering → VP Eng → CTO.

title: Entrepreneurship
description: Found a startup. Use network from IIT/NIT. Apply to YC, Sequoia Surge, Accel India.

title: Class 10 (PCM or Commerce with Maths)
description: Secure 60%+. Maths is essential for BCA admission.

title: Class 11–12
description: PCM or Commerce with Maths. Focus on Maths and Computer Science if available.

title: BCA (3 years)
description: Bachelor of Computer Applications. Learn: C, Java, Python, DBMS, Networking, Web Dev. CGPA matters for MCA/placements.

title: Skill Building (parallel)
description: During BCA: build projects, contribute to GitHub, get Internshala internships, complete 1–2 certifications.

title: MCA (2 years) — Optional but Recommended
description: Master of Computer Applications. NIMCET exam for top NITs. Alternatively: direct job after BCA at service companies.

title: Entry Role
description: Junior Developer / Software Trainee. ₹3–8 LPA at service companies, ₹8–18 LPA at product companies with strong skills.

title: Mid Level (3–5 yrs)
description: Software Developer / Module Lead. ₹12–30 LPA.

title: Senior (5+ yrs)
description: Senior Developer / Tech Lead. ₹25–60 LPA.

title: Education Foundation
description: B.Tech/B.Sc in CS, Maths, Statistics, or Physics. OR BCA/MCA. Strong Maths (Stats, Linear Algebra, Calculus) is non-negotiable.

title: Core Skills
description: Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib), SQL, Statistics, ML fundamentals. Take Kaggle courses — all free.

title: Build Portfolio
description: 3–5 Kaggle competitions (get a bronze/silver medal). 2–3 end-to-end ML projects on GitHub. 1 data blog on Medium/Substack.

title: Specialization
description: Choose: NLP / Computer Vision / Time Series / Recommendation Systems / LLM Engineering.

title: Entry Role (0–2 yrs)
description: Data Analyst → Junior Data Scientist. ₹5–15 LPA. Focus on real business problems.

title: Mid Level (2–4 yrs)
description: Data Scientist / ML Engineer. Build and deploy models in production. ₹15–40 LPA.

title: Senior (4–7 yrs)
description: Senior DS / Senior MLE. Own ML systems end-to-end. ₹35–80 LPA.

title: Lead / Principal
description: Staff MLE / Principal Data Scientist / Head of AI. ₹80 L – 2 Cr+.

title: Education
description: B.Tech CSE/IT or BCA. Some enter via Diploma + certifications. Networking basics (TCP/IP, OSI) are must-know.

title: Fundamentals
description: Linux, Networking, Scripting (Python/Bash), Operating Systems. TryHackMe + HackTheBox for hands-on practice. Both free tiers available.

title: Specialize
description: Choose: Ethical Hacking / SOC Analyst / AppSec / Cloud Security / Malware Analysis / VAPT.

title: Certifications
description: CEH (basic), CompTIA Security+ (globally recognized), OSCP (gold standard for penetration testing).

title: Entry Role (0–2 yrs)
description: SOC Analyst / Junior Penetration Tester / Security Analyst. ₹4–12 LPA.

title: Mid Level (2–5 yrs)
description: Penetration Tester / Security Engineer / VAPT Specialist. ₹12–30 LPA.

title: Senior (5–8 yrs)
description: Senior Security Engineer / Red Team Lead / AppSec Lead. ₹30–70 LPA.

title: Leadership
description: CISO / Head of Cybersecurity / Security Director. ₹60 L – 2 Cr+.

title: Class 6–10
description: Build strong Biology, Chemistry, Physics base. Score 90%+ in Science.

title: Class 11–12 (PCB)
description: Physics, Chemistry, Biology. NEET coaching mandatory. Free resources: Unacademy, PW. Paid: Aakash, Allen.

title: NEET UG
description: National Eligibility cum Entrance Test. 720 marks. Government college: 600+ required for good colleges. Held annually by NTA.

title: MBBS (5.5 years)
description: 4.5 years academics + 1 year rotating internship. Government colleges: ₹10K–1.5L/yr fees. Private: ₹10–25L/yr.

title: MBBS Internship (1 yr)
description: Mandatory clinical rotation across all departments. Stipend: ₹8K–25K/month.

title: NEXT / NEET PG (choose specialization)
description: Previously MCI exam, now NEXT. Gives access to MD/MS programs. Rank determines branch and college.

title: MD / MS (3 years)
description: Specialization. MD: medicine branches (Dermatology, Psychiatry, Radiology, etc). MS: surgery branches (Ortho, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery).

title: Super Specialization — DM / MCh
description: 2–3 years. DM: Cardiology, Nephrology, Neurology. MCh: Cardiac Surgery, Neurosurgery, Plastic Surgery.

title: Practice
description: Govt hospital (service + salary), Private hospital (higher pay), Own clinic/nursing home (entrepreneurial).

title: Career Peak
description: Senior Consultant / HOD / Professor + HOD / Medical Director / Hospital Chain Owner.

title: Class 11–12 (PCB or PCM)
description: Physics, Chemistry mandatory. Biology preferred. Score 60%+.

title: D.Pharm (2 years) OR B.Pharm (4 years)
description: D.Pharm: direct pharmacy practice. B.Pharm: opens R&D, industry, and further education doors.

title: Registration
description: Register with State Pharmacy Council to practice. Required to open pharmacy or work in hospital.

title: Entry Roles
description: Retail Pharmacist / Hospital Pharmacist / Quality Control Analyst / Medical Representative. ₹2–6 LPA.

title: M.Pharm (2 years)
description: Specialization: Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology, Pharmacognosy, Pharm Analysis, Drug Regulatory Affairs.

title: Industry Roles (Post M.Pharm)
description: R&D Scientist / Regulatory Affairs Officer / Quality Assurance Manager / Clinical Research Associate. ₹6–20 LPA.

title: Senior Industry Roles
description: Senior R&D / RA Manager / Plant Head / VP Regulatory. ₹20–60 LPA.

title: Own Pharmacy / Franchise
description: Open retail pharmacy (₹5–15L investment) or franchise (Apollo Pharmacy, MedPlus, 1mg). ₹30K–3L/month profit.

title: Graduation (Any Stream)
description: UPSC requires graduation in any subject. Many toppers: Engineering / Law / Humanities. Focus on reading habit, current affairs from Day 1.

title: Know the Exam
description: 3 stages: Prelims (objective) → Mains (written) → Interview (Personality Test). Total: ~2 years of serious preparation for most.

title: Prelims Preparation
description: NCERT Class 6–12 (all subjects) → Standard books (Laxmikanth, Spectrum, G.C. Leong) → 5–10 years previous papers → Current affairs daily (The Hindu/Indian Express).

title: Prelims (Stage 1)
description: 2 papers: GS (General Studies) + CSAT. 200 marks each. CSAT is qualifying only (33%). GS score decides cut-off.

title: Mains (Stage 2)
description: 9 papers: Essay + GS 1/2/3/4 + Optional Subject (2 papers) + Language papers. 1750 marks. Writing quality matters enormously.

title: Interview (Stage 3)
description: Personality Test (275 marks). Board of UPSC members. Tests character, leadership, awareness, communication.

title: Training (Post Selection)
description: IAS: LBSNAA Mussoorie. IPS: SVP NPA Hyderabad. IFS: FSOI + Lal Bahadur Shastri National Academy.

title: Posting & Career
description: SDM → DM/Collector → Secretary → Chief Secretary (State) | Under Secretary → Joint Secretary → Additional Secretary → Secretary (Centre) | Ambassador (IFS)

title: Education
description: Graduation in any stream. Commerce/Maths background helps but not mandatory. 60% marks preferred.

title: Choose Your Target
description: IBPS PO (Bank PO) / IBPS Clerk / SBI PO / SBI Clerk / RBI Grade B / RBI Assistant / SEBI Grade A / NABARD Grade A.

title: Prepare
description: Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, English, Banking Awareness, Computer. Mains adds Data Analysis, General/Economy/Banking Awareness essay.

title: IBPS PO / SBI PO (Entry Level Management)
description: Join as Probationary Officer. Training period 2 years. Posted anywhere in India.

title: Growth Path (PO Route)
description: PO → Officer Scale 1 → Officer Scale 2 (Branch Manager) → Scale 3 → AGM → DGM → GM → ED → MD/CEO

title: RBI Grade B (Elite Route)
description: Phase 1 + Phase 2 (very tough). Posted at RBI offices. ₹35,150/month + perks. Path: Grade B → C → D (Executive Director) → Deputy Governor → Governor.

title: Class 11–12 (PCM)
description: Focus on Maths and Physics. JEE Mains for admission to NITs/IITs/Govt colleges. State entrance for state colleges.

title: B.Tech / B.E. Civil Engineering (4 years)
description: Structures, Geotechnical, Transportation, Environmental, Construction Management, Hydraulics. Internship on construction site is essential.

title: Licensure
description: Register with Institute of Engineers India (IEI). Get AMIE or pursue Graduate Engineer from state.

title: Entry Roles (0–3 yrs)
description: Site Engineer / Junior Engineer / Structural Engineer / Quality Engineer. ₹3–8 LPA.

title: Mid Level (3–7 yrs)
description: Project Engineer / Senior Site Engineer / Design Engineer. ₹8–18 LPA.

title: Senior Level (7–12 yrs)
description: Project Manager / Senior Design Engineer / DGM Civil. ₹18–40 LPA.

title: Leadership
description: General Manager / VP Infrastructure / Director Projects. ₹40–80 LPA.

title: Own Business
description: Civil Contractor → Construction firm → Infrastructure company → Real estate developer.

title: Class 11–12 (Commerce)
description: Accounts, Economics, Business Studies, Maths. Score 60%+. PCM students also eligible.

title: CA Foundation
description: Register with ICAI after Class 12. 4 papers: Accounts, Law, Maths/Stats, Economics. Pass both groups (200 marks each).

title: CA Intermediate
description: 8 papers in 2 groups. Accounts, Law, Costing, Taxation, Advanced Accounts, Audit, Financial Management, IT/SM. Pass both groups.

title: Articleship (3 years)
description: Mandatory practical training under a CA firm. Small firms: tax + audit work. Big 4 (Deloitte/PwC/EY/KPMG): industry exposure, better placement.

title: CA Final
description: 8 papers: 2 groups. FR, SFM, Audit, Law, Costing + 3 electives (Risk, Global FR, Economics for Finance, etc). Toughest CA exam.

title: Membership (ACA)
description: Associate Chartered Accountant. Can practice independently or join industry.

title: Entry Roles
description: Big 4 (₹7–12 LPA) / Mid-firms (₹5–8 LPA) / Industry (₹8–15 LPA) / Own practice.

title: Growth
description: Senior Associate → Manager → Senior Manager → Director / Partner at firms. OR CFO track in industry.

title: Graduation
description: Any bachelor's degree with 50%+. Work experience of 1–3 years significantly boosts CAT score value and IIM calls.

title: Work Experience (Recommended)
description: 1–3 years work exp before MBA. IIMs prefer: 24–36 months. Freshers join but have lower salary leverage.

title: Entrance Exam
description: CAT (IIMs) → Scores used by 100+ colleges. Also: XAT (XLRI), SNAP (Symbiosis), MAT, CMAT, NMAT, GMAT (international/ISB).

title: MBA Program (2 years)
description: Year 1: Core (Finance, Marketing, HR, Operations, Strategy, Quant). Year 2: Specialization + Summer Internship (crucial for placement).

title: Summer Internship (After Year 1)
description: 2-month internship. IIM-A/B/C: McKinsey, BCG, Bain, Goldman Sachs, etc. Stipend: ₹1–5L/month. Most convert to PPO (Pre-Placement Offer).

title: Placement (Post MBA)
description: IIM A/B/C: ₹25–90 LPA average. Consulting, Finance, FMCG, Tech are top hirers. Tier-2: ₹8–20 LPA.

title: MBA Career Tracks
description: Consulting / Finance (IB, PE, VC) / Marketing / General Management / Operations / Entrepreneurship.

title: Business Idea Validation
description: Identify demand in your locality. Talk to 20 potential customers. Check competition. Low competition + high need = good.

title: Legal Registration
description: Shop and Establishment Act registration at local Municipal Corporation (₹500–2000, varies by state). Simple process, usually same day.

title: GST Registration (if turnover > ₹20L/yr)
description: GST Portal: gst.gov.in → Free registration → Takes 3–7 working days. Need PAN + Aadhaar + Bank account + Shop address proof.

title: FSSAI License (Food businesses)
description: If selling any food item → FSSAI Basic license (₹100/yr) at fssai.gov.in. State license for larger operations. Required by law.

title: Udyam Registration (MSME)
description: Register at udyamregistration.gov.in → Free → Unlocks: MSME loans at 8–12% interest, govt tenders, priority credit, subsidies.

title: Bank Account & Business Finance
description: Current account at any bank. MUDRA Loan (Shishu: up to ₹50K, Kishor: ₹50K–5L, Tarun: ₹5L–10L) from PM MUDRA Yojana — no collateral.

title: Source Products
description: For FMCG: Local distributor/stockist contact. For electronics: Wholesale markets (Nehru Place Delhi, SP Road Bangalore, Lamington Rd Mumbai). For pharma: C&F agent.

title: Digital Presence
description: Google Business Profile (free) → WhatsApp Business (free) → Meesho/JioMart seller for online orders → Get listed on Swiggy Instamart / Zepto (for grocery).

title: Growth
description: Expand inventory → Hire helper → Open second outlet → Become area distributor → Franchise model.

title: After 12th (CLAT Route)
description: 5-year integrated BA.LLB / BBA.LLB / BSc.LLB via CLAT / AILET / LSAT India. National Law Universities are top tier.

title: OR After Graduation (3-year LLB)
description: Any graduation + 3-year LLB. Slower but available to all streams. Delhi University, Symbiosis, Amity are popular.

title: Bar Council Enrollment
description: Pass State Bar Council exam → Enroll as Advocate. Required to practice in courts.

title: Internships (During Study)
description: Court internship with senior advocate + Law firm internship. Both crucial. Apply to AZB, Cyril Amarchand, Shardul Amarchand, Khaitan.

title: Entry Roles
description: Junior Advocate (₹10K–50K/month initially — grows fast) / Law firm Associate (₹6–15 LPA) / Corporate Legal (₹8–20 LPA) / Judicial Services.

title: Growth
description: Associate → Senior Associate → Partner at law firm. OR Court advocate → Senior Advocate designation. OR Corporate: Legal Manager → General Counsel → CLO.

title: Foundation
description: Any degree helps but not required. Start learning Figma (free) today. No gatekeeping in design — portfolio is everything.

title: Core Skills
description: Figma (must), User Research, Wireframing, Prototyping, Design Thinking, Usability Testing, Visual Design basics.

title: Build Portfolio
description: 3–5 case studies. Include: Problem → Research → Sketches → Wireframes → Final Design → Results. Add to Behance/Dribbble.

title: Specialize
description: Choose: Mobile App Design / Web Design / SaaS Product / Fintech UI / Healthcare UX / Gaming UI.

title: Entry Role (0–2 yrs)
description: Junior UI/UX Designer / Product Design Intern → Designer. ₹4–12 LPA.

title: Mid Level (2–4 yrs)
description: UI/UX Designer / Senior Designer. Own features. ₹12–30 LPA.

title: Senior / Lead (4–7 yrs)
description: Senior Designer / Design Lead / UX Architect. ₹30–70 LPA.

title: Leadership
description: Principal Designer / Head of Design / VP Design / Chief Design Officer. ₹70L–2 Cr+.

title: Education Options
description: B.Sc Agriculture (4 yrs via ICAR-AIEEA or state exams) OR B.Tech AgriTech/Food Tech OR Diploma in Agriculture (2 yrs, state level).

title: Core Knowledge
description: Soil science, Crop science, Agronomy, Plant pathology, Agricultural economics. Hands-on farm experience is essential.

title: Career Paths
description: Govt agriculture officer, agri input company, AgriTech startup, farming entrepreneur, cooperative sector, export/import, teaching.

title: Government Jobs
description: Agriculture Officer (State PSC) / NABARD Officer / FCI (Food Corporation of India) / IARI Scientist / Agricultural Scientist (ICAR) / Block Agriculture Officer.

title: AgriTech Sector
description: Work at agri-startups: drone services, precision farming, soil testing, farmer advisory apps, agri e-commerce.

title: Entrepreneurship
description: Organic farming / Poly house / Mushroom cultivation / Apiculture / Dairy / Agro-processing unit — all supported by PM schemes.
